markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Mysore Warriors wins the Bengaluru Blasters vs Mysore Warriors men's professional T20 (M) cricket match originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 4:30 AM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
If the Bengaluru Blasters vs Mysore Warriors men's professional T20 (M) cricket match originally scheduled for Jul 5, 2026 at 4:30 AM EDT ends in a tie, draw, no result (NR), abandonment, or cancellation, and no official winner is declared, all markets will resolve to $0.50.
In the event of a forfeit, disqualification, or concession:
  If it occurs before the match begins, all markets will resolve to $0.50.
  If it occurs after the match has begun, and the governing body declares an official winner, the market will resolve based on that result.
If play begins but insufficient play occurs to determine an official result, all markets will resolve to $0.50.
markets.title: Bengaluru Blasters vs Mysore Warriors Winner?
